code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut max_val = 0
mut min_val = 0
mut initialized = false
for tok in tokens
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    if not initialized
      max_val = n
      min_val = n
      initialized = true
    else
      if n > max_val
        max_val = n
      end
      if n < min_val
        min_val = n
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("max=#{max_val}")
println("min=#{min_val}")
